source.title: Colorectal cancer — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults with established colorectal cancer and people receiving colorectal-cancer care; screening and undiagnosed symptoms require separate pathways.
source.setting: Primary and specialist care as qualified by the cited recommendations.
source.exclusions: Supports clinician-entered established-diagnosis, prior treatment, bowel-function impact, result, surveillance, recurrence, and follow-up documentation without interpreting colonoscopy or generating treatment.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting treatment history, bowel, urinary, sexual, stoma, bleeding, discharge, functional, and patient-question context.
